title: 情けは人のためならず

text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking around the school
grounds...
CRASH!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ah! I'm so sorry! Are you okay?!

Kitasan Black bumps into me and drops her
belongings, scattering her stuff everywhere. As I
go to pick it all up...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Kita, did you drop this cold medicine?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
And this vitamin drink... Are you feeling sick,
Kita?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that stuff's for Dia, not me. I'm heading to
visit her in the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She has a race soon, so it's the worst timing. I
know snacks won't help her much, but I can't just
sit by and do nothing.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
How sweet of you. Sports drinks will help too!
Here, have mine!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Take this apple compote too. I was just about to
give you some anyway.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's made from the apples you helped me carry
home the other day.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I remember that! Thank you so much! I'm sure
she'll love this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, take this too! Just a little thank-you from
Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there you are, Kita! I found that thing you
wanted! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: This is so much. Are you sure?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Well, you're always helping me out. It's about
time I paid you back!
choice_data_list: Let me help you carry all that.
Let me help you carry all that.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm here... Dia, are you awake? How are
you feeling?
choice_data_list: I'll put the get-well-soon gifts over here.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita? Thanks for coming...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ACHOO!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You okay? Feeling chilly? I bought you the cold
medicine you usually take!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Everyone sent along some tasty food, so eat up,
drink up, and rest up, okay?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry about all this, Kita. You really went out of
your way for me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? I'm doing this
because I want to!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You have a race coming up, remember? I want to
leave you in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But there's no point if I don't beat you fair and
square. I won't accept the win unless you're in
tip-top shape!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
See, I've got my own reasons too! So just rest up
and let me handle this!
choice_data_list: Guess you'd better get well soon!
Bounce back even better than before!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
See, I've got my own reasons too! So just rest up
and let me handle this!
choice_data_list: Guess you'd better get well soon!
Guess you'd better get well soon!
Bounce back even better than before!
Bounce back even better than before!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, I suppose you're right.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to go head-to-head with you one more
time... No, over and over again!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
After all you've done for me... I'll definitely be in
perfect condition for the race!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yesss! Me too!

Together with the light from the sunset, the
warmth of their bond fills the whole room.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Of course! I won't let Kita outshine me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll eat my fill and get plenty of rest... Then I'll feel
even better than before!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Gotcha! Okay!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has just entered the gate, and
she's aiming for a full recovery!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Apple compote, carrot porridge, cold
medicine... I'm all set!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Will sheer good health be enough for her to
outrun Kitasan Black? The race to find out is
about to begin!

Laughter and delicious smells fill the sunset-lit
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll make sure to eat my fill and recover!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? What's that bottle over there? "Golshi
Mix"?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, this must be that mystery drink Gold
Ship gave me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
"Concentrated Antibiotic Umacillin"? Wow, there
are so many things here I've never seen before...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa! Hold up a sec, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Let's start with the safe stuff, shall we?!
